summary: A short vertical video set to music, posted by a U.S. Border Patrol Rio Grande Valley account. It opens on a silver challenge-coin graphic reading 'RIO GRANDE VALLEY SECTOR - McALLEN STATION' with an embossed scene of a Border Patrol agent, a K9, a helicopter, a patrol vehicle and a horse-mounted agent, and the number '089'. It then cuts to an in-vehicle shot of a Border Patrol agent in a ball cap and sunglasses driving and speaking into a handheld radio, a U.S. Customs and Border Protection shoulder patch visible on the sleeve. The audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Silver challenge-coin graphic on black: 'RIO GRANDE VALLEY SECTOR - McALLEN STATION', embossed agent, K9, helicopter, vehicle and mounted agent, number '089'.
In-vehicle shot of a Border Patrol agent in a cap and sunglasses driving while speaking into a handheld radio; a U.S. Customs and Border Protection shoulder patch is visible.

notable_text: RIO GRANDE VALLEY SECTOR; McALLEN STATION; 089; U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION
